name: Summertime New Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Cooked new potatoes (cut into 1/2-inch pieces)
1 tablespoon Chopped fresh thyme (or 1 teaspoon dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the potatoes, bell peppers, celery, red onion, chives, and parsley, tossing gently to mix.
2. In a small bowl, combine the oil, vinegar, thyme, salt, and pepper.
3. Pour the dressing over the potato mixture, tossing gently to combine.
4. Serve at room temperature. Makes 12 servings.
